action_set_definitions.name: get_comprehensive_status
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current operational state of the wastewater treatment plant. Essential for identifying initial conditions and monitoring progress.

action_set_definitions.name: update_aeration_output
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the aeration blower output by a specific percentage change to control Dissolved Oxygen (DO) levels.

delta_percent.description: The percentage points to add or subtract from the current aeration output (e.g., -5.0 to decrease output by 5%).

action_set_definitions.name: update_recycle_flow
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the internal recycle flow rate to manage the denitrification process.

delta_flow.description: The amount to change the flow rate by in m³/h (e.g., 10.0 to increase flow by 10 units).

action_set_definitions.name: step_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the plant simulation by one time step to allow process changes to stabilize and to observe the resulting state.

state_description.influent_flow_rate: The current rate of wastewater entering the plant in cubic meters per hour (m³/h).
state_description.dissolved_oxygen_concentration: Concentration of oxygen in the aeration tank (mg/L). Affects microbial activity.
state_description.mlss_level: Mixed Liquor Suspended Solids (mg/L), representing the concentration of biomass in the system.
state_description.internal_recycle_flow: The flow rate of nitrate-rich liquor recycled from the aerobic to the anoxic zone (m³/h).
state_description.effluent_nitrogen_content: Current concentration of Total Nitrogen in the treated water (mg/L).
state_description.chemical_tank_storage: Remaining percentage of flocculant/carbon source in the storage tank (%).
state_description.cumulative_energy_kwh: Total energy consumed by pumps and aerators during the current operation cycle.
